payload.answer: I’m not sure what “the thing from yesterday” refers to. Please clarify what you want remembered.
repair_options: Specify the exact fact, preference, plan, or note you want remembered.
Provide enough context to identify the relevant conversation or event from yesterday.
If this refers to an existing memory, quote or summarize the memory you want updated.
If this is a new memory, state it directly in a durable form.
